boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: The app hit an unexpected error while rendering this screen. You can retry the current session or reload the application.

server.AUTH_USER_DISABLED: Your account has been disabled. Please contact an administrator.
server.AUTH_TENANT_DISABLED: Your organization has been disabled. Please contact support.
server.AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
server.AUTH_REFRESH_INVALID: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
server.AUTH_USER_NOT_FOUND: Your user account could not be found.
server.AUTH_PASSWORD_POLICY: Your new password does not meet the security requirements.
server.CASH_SESSION_REQUIRED: Open an active cash session before creating or refunding sales.
server.CASH_SESSION_SITE_REQUIRED: Select an active site before opening or using a cash session.
server.CASH_SESSION_ALREADY_OPEN_FOR_CASHIER: You already have an open cash session for the active site.
server.CASH_SESSION_ALREADY_OPEN_FOR_REGISTER: That register already has an open cash session.
server.CASH_SESSION_OPENING_FLOAT_MISMATCH: The opening float must match the denomination count total.
server.CASH_SESSION_OPENING_FLOAT_INVALID: The opening float must be zero or greater.
server.CASH_SESSION_COUNT_MISMATCH: The closing count must match the denomination count total.
server.CASH_SESSION_COUNT_INVALID: The closing count must be zero or greater.
server.CASH_SESSION_NOT_FOUND: That cash session does not exist.
server.CASH_SESSION_NOT_CLOSED: The day-close summary is only available after the session is closed.
server.PRODUCT_FRACTION_STEP_REQUIRED: Set a fraction step greater than zero before enabling fractional sales.
server.PRODUCT_FRACTION_MINIMUM_REQUIRED: Set a minimum sale quantity greater than zero before enabling fractional sales.
server.PRODUCT_FRACTION_MINIMUM_BELOW_STEP: The minimum sale quantity must be greater than or equal to the fraction step.
server.PRODUCT_FRACTION_MINIMUM_NOT_ALIGNED: The minimum sale quantity must be a multiple of the fraction step.
server.SALE_QUANTITY_NOT_WHOLE: This product must be sold in whole units.
server.SALE_QUANTITY_BELOW_MINIMUM: This product must be sold with a minimum quantity.
server.SALE_QUANTITY_NOT_ALIGNED: This product must be sold in increments of its configured fraction step.
server.SALE_FRACTION_POLICY_MISSING: This product is missing its fraction policy configuration.
server.SALE_QUANTITY_INVALID: The quantity must be greater than zero.
server.SALE_PAYMENTS_SUM_MISMATCH: The split payments must sum to the sale total.
server.TRANSFER_SITES_IDENTICAL: Origin and destination sites must be different.
server.TRANSFER_SITE_NOT_FOUND: The selected transfer site could not be found or is inactive.
server.TRANSFER_PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND: The selected product could not be found or is inactive.
server.TRANSFER_QUANTITY_INVALID: Transfer quantity must be greater than zero.
server.TRANSFER_ITEMS_REQUIRED: Add at least one product before recording a transfer.
server.TRANSFER_INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: The origin site does not have enough stock for this transfer.
server.TRANSFER_NOT_FOUND: The transfer could not be found.
server.TRANSFER_ALREADY_VOID: This transfer has already been voided.
server.TRANSFER_VOID_INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: Cannot void — the destination site no longer has enough stock to reverse this transfer.
server.TRANSFER_NOT_IN_TRANSIT: Only transfers currently in transit can be received.
server.TRANSFER_RECEIVED_EXCEEDS_SHIPPED: A received quantity cannot be greater than the shipped quantity.
server.TRANSFER_RECEIVE_LINE_MISMATCH: The receive payload does not match the transfer's line items.
server.QUOTATION_NOT_FOUND: The quotation could not be found.
server.QUOTATION_ITEMS_REQUIRED: Add at least one product before saving the quotation.
server.QUOTATION_PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND: A selected product could not be found or is inactive.
server.QUOTATION_CUSTOMER_NOT_FOUND: The selected customer could not be found or is inactive.
server.QUOTATION_SITE_NOT_FOUND: The selected site could not be found or is inactive.
server.QUOTATION_QUANTITY_INVALID: Quotation line quantity must be greater than zero.
server.QUOTATION_INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION: This status change is not allowed for the current quotation state.
server.QUOTATION_DELETE_NOT_DRAFT: Only draft quotations can be deleted.
server.QUOTATION_SEQUENTIAL_MISSING: No active quotation sequential is configured for this tenant.
server.RECEIPT_TEMPLATE_NOT_FOUND: The receipt template could not be found.
server.RECEIPT_TEMPLATE_LAST_FOR_KIND: You cannot delete or deactivate the only template for this kind. Create or activate a replacement first.
server.RECEIPT_TEMPLATE_NAME_DUPLICATE: A template with this name already exists for this kind.
server.SALE_NOT_FOUND: The sale could not be found.
server.SALE_QUANTITY_NONPOSITIVE: The selected quantity must resolve to a positive stock amount.
server.SALE_SEQUENTIAL_MISSING: No active sale sequential is configured for this tenant.
server.SALE_CUSTOMER_INVALID: The selected customer could not be found or is inactive.
server.SALE_PRODUCT_INVALID: The product {{productName}} could not be found or is inactive.
server.SALE_UNIT_INVALID: The unit selection is invalid for the product {{productName}}.
server.SALE_INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: Insufficient stock for {{productName}} at the active site. Available: {{available}}, requested: {{requested}}.
server.LOT_QUANTITY_INVALID: The lot quantity must be greater than zero.
server.LOT_COST_INVALID: The lot unit cost cannot be negative.
server.LOT_PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND: The product for this lot was not found.
server.LOT_DISCOUNT_NOT_ELIGIBLE: This lot cannot receive a discount suggestion: it has no sellable stock or its expiry is outside the discount window.
server.LOT_DISCOUNT_ALREADY_ACTIVE: This lot already has an active discount suggestion.
server.PRICE_SUGGESTION_NOT_FOUND: That discount suggestion no longer exists or was already dismissed.
server.LOYALTY_INSUFFICIENT_POINTS: The adjustment would leave the customer with negative points.
server.SALE_DISCOUNT_EXCEEDS_TOTAL: The discount amount cannot exceed the sale total.
server.SALE_AMOUNT_RECEIVED_BELOW_TOTAL: The amount received cannot be less than the sale total for a paid sale.
server.SALE_UPDATE_VOIDED_FORBIDDEN: A voided sale cannot be updated.
server.SALE_VOID_NOT_COMPLETED: Only completed sales can be voided.
server.SALE_WITHOUT_ITEMS: The sale has no line items to process.
server.SALE_RETURN_NOT_COMPLETED: Only completed sales can be refunded.
server.SALE_RETURN_ALREADY_REFUNDED: This sale has already been refunded.
server.SALE_RETURN_DUPLICATE: This sale already has a recorded refund.
server.SALE_REVERSAL_PRODUCT_MISSING: A product from the sale could not be found while reversing stock.
server.SALE_DRAFT_REQUIRED: This action is only available for draft sales.
server.SALE_SUSPEND_OWNERSHIP_REQUIRED: Only the cashier who suspended this sale can resume or discard it.
server.SALE_REPRINT_DRAFT_FORBIDDEN: Draft sales have no receipt to reprint.
server.SALE_REPRINT_ACTIVE_SESSION_REQUIRED: Cashiers can only reprint sales from their own active cash session.
server.SALE_COMPLETE_DRAFT_SUSPENDED: This draft is still suspended. Resume it before completing the sale.
server.SALE_CHANGE_TABLE_INVALID_STATUS: Only suspended draft sales can be moved between tables.
server.SALE_SERVICE_CHARGE_DISABLED: This tenant has no service charge configured. Reopen the payment modal to refresh the sale total.
server.SALE_SERVICE_CHARGE_DRIFT: The service charge no longer matches the restaurant settings. Reopen the payment modal to refresh the sale total.
server.SYNC_LOCAL_RECORD_MISSING: The local record no longer exists. Discard the local change to accept the remote version.
server.AI_DISABLED: AI features are turned off for this organization. Enable them in Company → AI settings.
server.AI_BUDGET_EXCEEDED: This month's AI spend has reached the configured budget. Raise the budget or wait until next month.
server.AI_PROVIDER_ERROR: The AI provider is unreachable or returned an error. Check the provider configuration and try again.
server.AI_COPILOT_SQL_REJECTED: The co-pilot could not run that analysis safely. Ask for a simpler question or narrow the filters.
server.AI_COPILOT_QUERY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: That analysis covers too much data. Narrow the date range or select a site and try again.
server.AI_VISION_NOT_AVAILABLE: The current AI provider does not support reading images. Switch the provider in Company → AI settings.
server.AI_VISION_PARSE_FAILED: The model could not read this invoice cleanly. Try a sharper photo or transcribe the line items manually.
server.AI_VISION_IMAGE_TOO_LARGE: The document is too large. Use a file under 10 MB.
server.AI_VOICE_NOT_AVAILABLE: The current AI provider does not support voice transcription. Switch the provider in Company → AI settings.
server.AI_VOICE_PARSE_FAILED: The model could not understand the audio. Try recording again in a quieter spot.
server.AI_VOICE_AUDIO_TOO_LARGE: The audio file is too large. Use a clip under 10 MB.
server.AI_VOICE_COMMAND_UNRECOGNIZED: I couldn't understand the command. Try recording again with a clear product and quantity.
server.FISCAL_PACK_NOT_AVAILABLE: Fiscal emission for this country is not available yet. The sale was completed without a fiscal document; check back when the country pack ships.
server.FISCAL_RFC_INVALID: The Mexican issuer RFC is not valid. Check length (12 for company, 13 for individual), structure, embedded date, and homoclave.
server.FISCAL_REGIMEN_INVALID: The fiscal regime or business activity code is not in the catalog. Pick one of the supported codes.
server.FISCAL_RUT_INVALID: The Chilean issuer RUT is not valid. Check format (body-verifier digit), and that the verifier digit matches the body.
server.FISCAL_NIT_INVALID: The Colombian issuer NIT is not valid: check the verification digit (for example 900373115-3).
server.FISCAL_NUMBERING_RANGE_INVALID: The DIAN numbering range is not valid. The starting consecutive must be a positive number and cannot be greater than the ending consecutive.
server.FISCAL_DOCUMENT_NOT_FOUND: The fiscal document or its retry row could not be found.
server.DEVICE_NOT_REGISTERED: This device is not registered for your organization. Sign out and sign back in to reconnect the device.
server.AUTHORITY_SITE_NOT_FOUND: That site is not available for pairing.
server.AUTHORITY_PAIRING_CODE_INVALID: That pairing code is invalid. Ask the hub admin for a new one.
server.AUTHORITY_PAIRING_CODE_EXPIRED: That pairing code expired. Ask the hub admin for a new one.
server.AUTHORITY_PAIRING_CODE_USED: That pairing code was already used or revoked.
server.AUTHORITY_DEVICE_NOT_REVOKABLE: Only hub-client terminals can be revoked from Authority health.
server.MISSING_COMMAND_ENVELOPE: This action is missing its command envelope. Reload the page and try again.
server.MODULE_NOT_ACTIVATED: This module is not active for your tenant. Ask the administrator to enable it from the Modules tab.
server.MODULE_UNKNOWN: That module is not registered in this version. Reload the page so the catalog can refresh.
server.CAF_NOT_AVAILABLE: Your tenant has no active CAF for this document type. Contact the administrator to register one.
server.CAF_EXHAUSTED: The active CAF's folios are exhausted. Register the next CAF to keep issuing.
server.IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_CONFLICT: This action was already processed with different data. Reload the page before retrying to avoid duplicates.
server.COMMAND_IN_PROGRESS: This action is already in progress. Wait a moment and try again.
server.PERIPHERAL_DRIVER_INVALID: That driver is not registered for this peripheral type yet.
server.PERIPHERAL_CONFIG_INVALID: The peripheral configuration does not match the selected driver.
server.PERIPHERAL_ACTIVE_DUPLICATE: Another active peripheral of this type already exists at this site.
server.PERIPHERAL_NOT_FOUND: The peripheral could not be found.
server.HARDWARE_OUTBOX_NOT_FOUND: The hardware job could not be found. Refresh the Operations Center and try again.
server.PAYMENT_RECONCILIATION_NO_MATCH: The matcher could not find a POS tender for this provider settlement. Review the reference and link the tender manually.
server.PAYMENT_RECONCILIATION_AMBIGUOUS: More than one POS tender looks like a plausible match. Review the candidates and resolve the conflict.
server.PAYMENT_RECONCILIATION_AI_DEGRADED: The AI tie-break was unavailable, so the matcher fell back to a manual review suggestion.
server.PAYMENT_OUTBOX_NOT_FOUND: That payment row no longer exists for this tenant. Refresh the Operations Center and try again.
server.PAYMENT_OUTBOX_NOT_RETRIABLE: This payment cannot be retried in its current status. Only declined, timed out, retrying, or dead-letter rows can go back to the queue.
server.RESTAURANT_TABLE_NOT_FOUND: That table no longer exists for this tenant. Refresh the list and try again.
server.RESTAURANT_TABLE_NAME_DUPLICATE: Another active table for this site already uses this name. Pick a different name or archive the existing table first.
server.KDS_ORDER_NOT_FOUND: That order is no longer on the kitchen board. Refresh and try again.
server.KDS_ORDER_NOT_READY: That order is no longer marked Ready. Refresh the board to see the current state.
server.CREDIT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: The projected balance would exceed the customer's credit limit. Ask an administrator to authorize an override or split the excess as cash.
server.CREDIT_SALE_CUSTOMER_REQUIRED: Credit sales require a customer to be attached. Pick a customer before charging to account.
server.CREDIT_OVERRIDE_FORBIDDEN: Only administrators can override the credit limit.
server.CREDIT_SALE_FORBIDDEN: Only managers and administrators can charge a sale to a customer's account.
server.REFUND_PARTIAL_CREDIT_NOT_SUPPORTED: Refunds for sales charged to credit are not yet supported. Reverse the customer account entry manually and then void the sale.
server.AI_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: This site has used its monthly AI quota. The counter renews on the first day of next month.
server.CASH_SESSION_LOAD_FAILED: The cash session record could not be loaded after creation. Refresh and try again; the change might still be persisted.
server.CASH_MOVEMENT_INVALID_AMOUNT: The cash movement amount must be a positive number greater than zero.
server.CASH_MOVEMENT_UNSUPPORTED_TYPE: Unsupported cash movement type. Contact support if you keep seeing this error.
server.CASH_MOVEMENT_PERSIST_FAILED: The cash movement could not be persisted. Refresh the session and check that no duplicate entry was already recorded.
server.RECEIPT_TEMPLATE_PERSIST_FAILED: The receipt template change could not be persisted. Refresh the list and try again.
server.FISCAL_SEQUENTIAL_NOT_ADVANCED: A concurrent emitter raced past the same fiscal sequential window. Retry the operation; the next attempt picks a fresh number.
server.DEVICE_PAIRING_CODE_ALLOCATION_EXHAUSTED: Could not allocate a unique device pairing code after several attempts. Wait a moment and request a new code.
server.CREDIT_LEDGER_INVALID_AMOUNT: The credit ledger amount must be a positive finite number.
server.STALE_VERSION: Another user changed this record while you were editing. Reload to get the latest version, then try again.
server.HARDWARE_NO_DRAWER_REGISTERED: No cash drawer is currently registered for this site. Pair one from Operations before opening the drawer.
server.HARDWARE_SALE_NOT_FOUND: That sale no longer exists for this tenant or this site. Refresh and try again.
server.HARDWARE_TRANSPORT_FAILED: The hardware command could not be delivered to the device. Check the connection and retry.
server.PAYMENT_CREDENTIAL_UNKNOWN_FIELD: The provider settings include a field that this rail does not recognise. Remove the unknown field and save again.
server.SALE_SPLIT_INVALID_STATUS: Only suspended draft sales can be split. Resume the draft or pick a different source.
server.SALE_SPLIT_ITEMS_NOT_FOUND: Some of the selected items do not belong to the source draft anymore. Refresh and retry.
server.SALE_SPLIT_NO_ITEMS_SELECTED: Pick at least one sale item before splitting the draft.
server.SYNC_OUTBOX_DEAD_LETTER: That sync entry is in dead-letter. Mark it resolved or escalate to an administrator.
server.SYNC_OUTBOX_NOT_FOUND: That sync entry no longer exists for this tenant. Refresh and try again.
server.networkUnavailable: Puntovivo couldn't reach the data service. Check your connection or make sure the app is open, then try again.
server.validationFailed: Some fields are missing or invalid. Check the highlighted fields and try again.
server.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
